title: AWeber vs HubSpot (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: AWeber vs HubSpot: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between AWeber and HubSpot comes down to your specific use case. AWeber is built for bloggers and solopreneurs wanting simplicity, while HubSpot targets businesses that want email and CRM in one platform.

comparison_table.tool_b: Businesses That Want Email And Crm In One Platform

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on bloggers and solopreneurs wanting simplicity
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on businesses that want email and CRM in one platform

faq.a: It depends on your use case. AWeber wins for bloggers and solopreneurs wanting simplicity, while HubSpot is stronger for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, AWeber or HubSpot?
faq.a: AWeber starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from HubSpot to AWeber?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
